name: CLEO Library
snippet: CLEO Library is a must-have tool powering thousands of modifications for GTA 3D era games - CLEO Library.

name: cleolibrary/CLEO5: CLEO 5 for GTA San Andreas
snippet: CLEO Library is an open-source extensible plugin for the game Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas by Rockstar Games, allowing the use of thousands of unique mods.

name: cleolibrary/CLEO4: CLEO 4 for GTA San Andreas
snippet: CLEO is a hugely popular extensible library plugin which brings new possibilities in scripting for the game Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas by Rockstar Games.

name: CLEO Library
snippet: CLEO is a scripting library that lets you run custom scripts in GTA games without touching game files. Several different versions, including CLEO 5 and CLEO ...

name: AndroidModLoader/GTA_CLEOMod
snippet: This is a CLEO wrapped in an AML mod! Original author of a CLEO on Android is Alexander Blade (http://www.dev-c.com/).

name: Personal and untidy set of functions used to decrypt Cleo
snippet: Personal and untidy set of functions used to decrypt Cleo mods. (Sketches written for CLEO library which allows creating mods for GTA SA and GTA SA-MP game)

name: III.VC.SA.CLEOScripts/readme.md at master · ThirteenAG
snippet: All scripts presented on this page require CLEO library. CLEO 2.0 for GTA3 and VC, CLEO 4 for GTA SA and the latest version of CLEO for Android.
